metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins by TRACTION.

plugins.name: sonar
plugins.description: Plays a sound when Claude Code finishes a task, hits an error, or needs your approval.

plugins.name: beacon
plugins.description: Tracks Claude Code session state in sessions.json. Build any tool on top of it.

plugins.name: audit
plugins.description: A read-only code advisor. Audits a codebase, ranks what's worth doing, and writes handoff plans any agent can execute. Never edits your code.
